data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the private note 'Difficult customer, be extra patient', which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the existence or retrieval of this specific private note in the system. The absence of this evidence indicates a clear gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: Private note 'Difficult customer, be extra patient' is not found in the evidence.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
